methods.name: function loadScript(url: string): Promise<HTMLScriptElement>
methods.description: Loads a JavaScript file by creating a script tag and appending it to the DOM.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the JavaScript file.

returns.description: Returns a Promise that resolves to the script element upon success.

methods.remarks: The <mark>loadScript</mark> function includes a built-in cache; subsequent calls return the same script element.
